headline: Bernstein downgrades Datadog on valuation concerns despite stronger AI outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Brokerage Bernstein downgraded cloud monitoring software company Datadog to "Market-Perform" from "Outperform" on Monday, saying the stock's recent rally has outpaced its improving fundamentals even as the company stands to benefit from growing artificial intelligence adoption.
